---
name: 💥 Breaking Change
about: Changes that require code modifications elsewhere or alter existing behavior
title: 'break: '
labels: breaking-change

## Related Issue
Fixes/Addresses # ## Description of the Breaking Change
## Migration / Breaking Impacts
## How Has This Been Tested?
## Checklist
- [ ] I have thoroughly tested the code to ensure no unintended side effects.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation/README to reflect this breaking change.
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project.
- [ ] **Important:** I have checked the **"Allow edits from maintainers"** box so the repository admins can collaborate directly on this branch.
